title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system enabling legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Built with Claude, it aims to leverage each new model release to significantly improve legal work processes rather than offer incremental gains.
